name: progress
title: Progress
description: Plex UI Progress — linear progress bar built on Radix Progress.Root with determinate (value 0-max) and indeterminate (sweep) modes.

files.content:
export { Progress } from '@plexui/ui/components/Progress';

docs: Import as `import { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress'`. See https://plexui.com/docs/components/progress for full prop reference.
